title: /Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/.claude 内容を表示せよ
summary_text: 結果、検証完了です（探索のみ）。 - `gws workflow --help` での実在 helper コマンド `+standup-report`, `+meeting-prep`, `+email-to-task`, `+weekly-digest`, `+file-announce` - `gws workflow +email-to-task --help` と `gws workflow +file-announce --help` は両方成功し、CLI 側の実装は存在しています。 - `/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills` 側での helper SKILL 実体 既存: - [gws-workflow-standup-report/SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/gws-workflow-standup-report/SKILL.md) - [gws-workflow-meeting-prep/SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/gws-workflow-meeting-prep/SKILL.md) - [gws-workflow-weekly-digest/SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/gws-workflow-weekly-digest/SKILL.md) - 不足（正確なパス） - [/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/gws-workflow-email-to-task/SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/gws-workflow-email-to-task/SKILL.md) - [/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/gws-workflow-file-announce/SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/gws-workflow-file-announce/SKILL.md) - 既存 helper SKILL の書式規約（観測結果の共通点） - 先頭 YAML Front Matter に `name` / `version` / `description` / `metadata.openclaw`（`category`, `requires.bins`, `cliHelp`）を持つ。 例: [gws-workflow-standup-report/SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/gws-workflow-standup-report/SKILL.md) - 本文は `# workflow +<command>` で開始。 - `PREREQUISITE` は `gws-shared/SKILL.md` 参照で統一。 - `## Usage`、`## Flags`（Markdown table）、`## Examples`、`## Tips`、`## See Also` の構成が揃っている。 例: [gws-workflow-meeting-prep/SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/gws-workflow-meeting-prep/SKILL.md), [gws-workflow-weekly-digest/SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/gws-workflow-weekly-digest/SKILL.md)
